CustomField.description: Marker for B1 (Phase B engagement seed) records on Event and Task. Defined on Activity (the polymorphic parent) so it projects onto both Event and Task. TRUE means this record was generated by FscEngagementSeed and is eligible for monthly date-shift by FscEngagementShifter.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscEngagementSeed / FscEngagementShifter. TRUE means this is generated demo-engagement data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Engagement
